parameters.query: =SELECT transcript FROM pb_conversations WHERE lead_id = '{{$json.lead_id}}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

=UPDATE pb_leads SET score = {{(() => { try { const d = typeof $json.choices[0].message.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content) : $json.choices[0].message.content; return parseInt(d.score) || 1; } catch(e) { return 1; } })()}}, intent = '{{(() => { try { const d = typeof $json.choices[0].message.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content) : $json.choices[0].message.content; return (d.intent || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); } catch(e) { return ''; } })()}}', notes = '{{(() => { try { const d = typeof $json.choices[0].message.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content) : $json.choices[0].message.content; return (d.notes || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); } catch(e) { return ''; } })()}}', risk_flags = '{{(() => { try { const d = typeof $json.choices[0].message.content === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content) : $json.choices[0].message.content; return JSON.stringify(Array.isArray(d.risk_flags) ? d.risk_flags : []); } catch(e) { return '[]'; } })()}}'::jsonb WHERE id = '{{$("Execute Workflow Trigger").first().json.lead_id}}'
